upcoming.note: These are the next things the system will work on — what each will be and why it matters. Tap to bump, push down, or shelf an item.

coming_soon.header: Reply to alerts right in Discord
coming_soon.why: your Discord message becomes the decision — no tapping through to a form
coming_soon.note: needs a ~5-min one-time bot setup when it reaches the front of the queue.

watch_list: The live public website still carries a database key inside its page code — that's a real public exposure regardless of the repo, and it's the one security item still worth acting on (moving it behind a server).
Publishing the fresh ratings makes those numbers public the moment it ships.
The automatic nightly ratings-refresh isn't switched on yet — it needs one more build step. The freshness alarm will catch any drift until then.
We're missing several data feeds — timestamped lineup news, reliable travel data, and backfilled depth charts — that block the next accuracy gains. The acquisition list has started.

setup.body: 1. Install the free ntfy app from your phone's app store. 2. Open it and tap Subscribe to topic. 3. Enter your private Hardwood topic — it is saved on your own computer and kept off this public page for security. 4. Done: your phone now buzzes whenever something needs your decision.
